instructions.instruction: Define attributes, then define relationships and actions incrementally. See [Resource Definition](#resource-definition) below.

instructions.instruction: Use `Ash.Changeset` and domain functions (e.g., `MyApp.Blog.create!`) to interact with resources. See [Using Actions](#using-actions) below.
